page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Direct Access to Orbitrap Data and Beyond.
R interface for Thermo Fisher Scientific raw files branched from rawDiag. This package wraps the functionality of the RawFileReader .NET assembly. Within the R environment, spectra and chromatograms are represented by S3 objects.
